name: dewey
description: Documentation component library with agent-ready outputs

scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/docs build && bun run --cwd www build
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/docs lint && bun run --cwd www typecheck
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run test && bun run build && bun run verify:package

author: Arach Tchoupani
